scripts.preview: npm run build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.local.jsonc --local --test-scheduled --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 8787
scripts.worker:setup:local: npm run worker:migrate:local && npm run worker:seed:local
scripts.worker:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --config wrangler.local.jsonc --local
scripts.worker:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --config wrangler.jsonc --remote
scripts.worker:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --config wrangler.local.jsonc --local --file worker/seeds/local-server-directory.sql
scripts.worker:types:check: wrangler types .wrangler/production-bindings.d.ts --include-runtime=false --config wrangler.jsonc && wrangler types .wrangler/local-bindings.d.ts --include-runtime=false --config wrangler.local.jsonc
